description: Write and execute a Gretl hansl script at /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/resid_diagnostics.inp to perform residual diagnostics on the 'food.gdt' dataset (/home/ga/Documents/gretl_data/food.gdt). The script must estimate an OLS regression of 'food_exp' on 'income', perform a Jarque-Bera normality test on the residuals, and generate both a scatter plot of residuals vs. fitted values (/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/resid_vs_fitted.png) and a residual histogram (/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/resid_histogram.png). Save a text report containing the regression coefficients, R-squared, and the Jarque-Bera test results to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/diagnostics_report.txt.
